sub_modules.nr_poly_deriv_eval: Combinational fixed-point Horner evaluator for p(x) and p'(x) with saturated signed output.
sub_modules.nr_newton_update: Combinational Newton-Raphson update block using fixed-point division and derivative-zero handling.
sub_modules.nr_convergence_check: Combinational convergence detector based on update magnitude and zero-derivative polynomial residual.
sub_modules.nr_root_verify: Combinational verification block that reevaluates p(root) and asserts valid when within tolerance.
